mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_contact(user_id,contact_id,status,create_time,update_time) VALUES(#{bean.userId},#{bean.contactId},#{bean.status},#{bean.createTime},#{bean.updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id,contact_id,status,create_time,update_time FROM user_contact WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY update_time DESC
